concepts.name: a handful of wet beach sand with letters pressed into it
concepts.blurb: marks that already cost him ten years

concepts.name: a rusted padlock with no key
concepts.blurb: closed and the key was never the point

concepts.name: a shipping container door swung open and empty
concepts.blurb: whatever was inside is already gone

concepts.name: a cracked Supreme Court seal in plaster
concepts.blurb: the ring held, the hairline did not

concepts.name: a steel mill smokestack mid-collapse
concepts.blurb: the fall is halfway and permanent

concepts.name: a plaster death mask with hollow eye sockets
concepts.blurb: two holes where something used to look out

concepts.name: a paper ballot folded into a tight square
concepts.blurb: folded until the words face inward

concepts.name: a single seashell with a word scratched into its surface
